verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing the official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: The page title is [Ghoul Update] Sailor Piece and the description says to join the community server for news, updates, and exclusive reward codes. It does not publish the current code strings.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: The public invite page is reachable only as a JavaScript app in this environment. Code channels/messages were not accessible, so this was not used as direct code evidence.

sources.name: Official Trello board
sources.notes: The public web page requires JavaScript. Local curl to the Trello JSON export failed DNS in this sandbox after clearing proxy variables, and the prior May 19 API check showed the codes card lagging behind current Ghoul Update codes. Not used as direct proof today.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Lists 8 active codes: SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It now lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG as inactive, and says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Lists the stored 9 Ghoul Update active codes and provides the exact reward bundles used for SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG variants, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It also still lists the older 10-code set as active, creating a conflict for those expired codes.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Lists the same 9 active codes kept in codes.json and marks the three SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG variants as new-servers rewards. It lists the older 10-code set as expired.

sources.name: Dexerto Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Says it added eight new codes after the Ghoul Update and lists all 9 active codes currently kept in codes.json. It also lists the older 10-code set as active, and its MASTERY reward bundle conflicts with Beebom's bundle.

decisions.reason: Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Dexerto all list it active/current on the May 20 check. No numeric level gate was published.
Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Dexerto all list it active/current on the May 20 check. No numeric level gate was published.

Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current; Pro Game Guides now lists it inactive. It was kept active because the expiry signal is a single current source and direct official evidence was unavailable.
Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Dexerto all list it active/current. Beebom and Dexerto match the stored reward bundle.

Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Dexerto all list it active/current. Beebom supports the stored reward bundle; Dexerto's MASTERY bundle conflicts and Pro Game Guides/Destructoid do not publish exact rewards.
Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Dexerto all list it active/current. No numeric level gate was published.
Current searches and checked sources did not show a new active code with official evidence, two credible current sources, or one current source explicitly citing official Discord for that new code.
No additional active code had strong enough expiry evidence to move today.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides lists it inactive, while Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or another strong current source joins Pro Game Guides.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom lists the stored mastery bundle with 25 Bloodline Stone and no Raid Key; Dexerto lists a bundle with 10 Bloodline Stones and 5 Raid Keys. Pro Game Guides and Destructoid only say free rewards.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep Beebom's exact bundle until official evidence or another exact current source confirms a different reward.

source_conflicts.conflict: 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1, DELAYCODENR2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, 1B300MVISITS, 1M100KLIKESTYYY, and TYSMFOR400KFOLLOWONEVENT remain split: Pro Game Guides and Destructoid list them inactive/expired, while Beebom and Dexerto still list them active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or active-source agreement becomes stronger than the stale-listing pattern.
